CreateCapacityProvider.description: Grants permission to create a new capacity provider. Capacity providers are associated with an Amazon ECS cluster and are used in capacity provider strategies to facilitate cluster auto scaling

CreateCluster.description: Grants permission to create a new Amazon ECS cluster

CreateExpressGatewayService.description: Grants permission to create a new Amazon ECS Express Gateway service with cluster and task definition

CreateService.description: Grants permission to run and maintain a desired number of tasks from a specified task definition via service creation

CreateTaskSet.description: Grants permission to create a new Amazon ECS task set

DeleteAccountSetting.description: Grants permission to modify the ARN and resource ID format of a resource for a specified IAM user, IAM role, or the root user for an account. You can specify whether the new ARN and resource ID format are disabled for new resources that are created

DeleteAttributes.description: Grants permission to delete one or more custom attributes from an Amazon ECS resource

DeleteCapacityProvider.description: Grants permission to delete the specified capacity provider

DeleteCluster.description: Grants permission to delete the specified cluster

DeleteExpressGatewayService.description: Grants permission to delete a specified Express Gateway service

DeleteService.description: Grants permission to delete a specified service within a cluster

DeleteTaskDefinitions.description: Grants permission to delete the specified task definitions by family and revision

DeleteTaskSet.description: Grants permission to delete the specified task set

DeregisterContainerInstance.description: Grants permission to deregister an Amazon ECS container instance from the specified cluster

DeregisterTaskDefinition.description: Grants permission to deregister the specified task definition by family and revision

DescribeCapacityProviders.description: Grants permission to describe one or more Amazon ECS capacity providers

DescribeClusters.description: Grants permission to describes one or more of your clusters

DescribeContainerInstances.description: Grants permission to describes Amazon ECS container instances

DescribeExpressGatewayService.description: Grants permission to describe the specified Express Gateway service

DescribeServiceDeployments.description: Grants permission to describe one or more of your service deployments

DescribeServiceRevisions.description: Grants permission to describe one or more of your service revisions

DescribeServices.description: Grants permission to describe the specified services running in your cluster

DescribeTaskDefinition.description: Grants permission to describe a task definition. You can specify a family and revision to find information about a specific task definition, or you can simply specify the family to find the latest ACTIVE revision in that family

DescribeTaskSets.description: Grants permission to describe Amazon ECS task sets

DescribeTasks.description: Grants permission to describe a specified task or tasks

DiscoverPollEndpoint.description: Grants permission to get an endpoint for the Amazon ECS agent to poll for updates

ExecuteCommand.description: Grants permission to run a command remotely on an Amazon ECS container

GetTaskProtection.description: Grants permission to retrieve the protection status of tasks in an Amazon ECS service

ListAccountSettings.description: Grants permission to list the account settings for an Amazon ECS resource for a specified principal

ListAttributes.description: Grants permission to lists the attributes for Amazon ECS resources within a specified target type and cluster

ListClusters.description: Grants permission to get a list of existing clusters

ListContainerInstances.description: Grants permission to get a list of container instances in a specified cluster

ListServiceDeployments.description: Grants permission to get a list of service deployments for a specified service

ListServices.description: Grants permission to get a list of services that are running in a specified cluster

ListServicesByNamespace.description: Grants permission to get a list of services that are running in a specified AWS Cloud Map Namespace

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to get a list of tags for the specified resource

ListTaskDefinitionFamilies.description: Grants permission to get a list of task definition families that are registered to your account (which may include task definition families that no longer have any ACTIVE task definitions)

ListTaskDefinitions.description: Grants permission to get a list of task definitions that are registered to your account

ListTasks.description: Grants permission to get a list of tasks for a specified cluster

Poll.description: Grants permission to an agent to connect with the Amazon ECS service to report status and get commands

PutAccountSetting.description: Grants permission to modify the ARN and resource ID format of a resource for a specified IAM user, IAM role, or the root user for an account. You can specify whether the new ARN and resource ID format are enabled for new resources that are created. Enabling this setting is required to use new Amazon ECS features such as resource tagging

PutAccountSettingDefault.description: Grants permission to modify the ARN and resource ID format of a resource type for all IAM users on an account for which no individual account setting has been set. Enabling this setting is required to use new Amazon ECS features such as resource tagging

PutAttributes.description: Grants permission to create or update an attribute on an Amazon ECS resource

PutClusterCapacityProviders.description: Grants permission to modify the available capacity providers and the default capacity provider strategy for a cluster

PutSystemLogEvents.description: Grants permission to collect system logs from the container instances

RegisterContainerInstance.description: Grants permission to register an EC2 instance into the specified cluster

RegisterTaskDefinition.description: Grants permission to register a new task definition from the supplied family and containerDefinitions

RunTask.description: Grants permission to start a task using random placement and the default Amazon ECS scheduler

StartTask.description: Grants permission to start a new task from the specified task definition on the specified container instance or instances

StartTelemetrySession.description: Grants permission to start a telemetry session

StopServiceDeployment.description: Grants permission to stop an ongoing service deployment

StopTask.description: Grants permission to stop a running task

SubmitAttachmentStateChanges.description: Grants permission to send an acknowledgement that attachments changed states

SubmitContainerStateChange.description: Grants permission to send an acknowledgement that a container changed states

SubmitTaskStateChange.description: Grants permission to send an acknowledgement that a task changed states

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag the specified resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to untag the specified resource

UpdateCapacityProvider.description: Grants permission to update the specified capacity provider

UpdateCluster.description: Grants permission to modify the configuration or settings to use for a cluster

UpdateClusterSettings.description: Grants permission to modify the settings to use for a cluster

UpdateContainerAgent.description: Grants permission to update the Amazon ECS container agent on a specified container instance

UpdateContainerInstancesState.description: Grants permission to the user to modify the status of an Amazon ECS container instance

UpdateExpressGatewayService.description: Grants permission to modify the parameters of an Express Gateway service

UpdateService.description: Grants permission to modify the parameters of a service

UpdateServicePrimaryTaskSet.description: Grants permission to modify the primary task set used in a service

UpdateTaskProtection.description: Grants permission to modify the protection status of a task

UpdateTaskSet.description: Grants permission to update the specified task set

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request

ecs:CreateAction.description: Filters access by the name of a resource-creating API action

ecs:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tag key-value pairs attached to the resource

ecs:account-setting.description: Filters access by the Amazon ECS account setting name

ecs:auto-assign-public-ip.description: Filters access by the public IP assignment configuration of your Amazon ECS task or Amazon ECS service that uses awsvpc network mode

ecs:capacity-provider.description: Filters access by the ARN of an Amazon ECS capacity provider

ecs:cluster.description: Filters access by the ARN of an Amazon ECS cluster

ecs:compute-compatibility.description: Filters access by the required compatibilities field provided in the request

ecs:container-instances.description: Filters access by the ARN of an Amazon ECS container instance

ecs:container-name.description: Filters access by the name of an Amazon ECS container which is defined in the ECS task definition

ecs:enable-ebs-volumes.description: Filters access by the Amazon ECS managed Amazon EBS volume capability of your ECS task or service

ecs:enable-ecs-managed-tags.description: Filters access by the enableECSManagedTags configuration of your Amazon ECS task or Amazon ECS service

ecs:enable-execute-command.description: Filters access by the execute-command capability of your Amazon ECS task or Amazon ECS service

ecs:enable-service-connect.description: Filters access by the enable field value in the Service Connect configuration

ecs:enable-vpc-lattice.description: Filters access by the VPC lattice capability of your Amazon ECS service

ecs:fargate-ephemeral-storage-kms-key.description: Filters access by the AWS KMS key id provided in the request

ecs:instance-metadata-tags-propagation.description: Filters access by the instance metadata tags propagation setting of your Amazon ECS capacity provider

ecs:namespace.description: Filters access by the ARN of AWS Cloud Map namespace which is defined in the Service Connect Configuration

ecs:privileged.description: Filters access by the privileged field provided in the request

ecs:propagate-tags.description: Filters access by the tag propagation configuration of your Amazon ECS task or Amazon ECS service

ecs:service.description: Filters access by the ARN of an Amazon ECS service

ecs:subnet.description: Filters access by the subnet configuration of your Amazon ECS task or Amazon ECS service that uses awsvpc network mode

ecs:task.description: Filters access by the ARN of an Amazon ECS task

ecs:task-cpu.description: Filters access by the task cpu, as an integer with 1024 = 1 vCPU, provided in the request

ecs:task-definition.description: Filters access by the ARN of an Amazon ECS task definition

ecs:task-memory.description: Filters access by the task memory, as an integer representing MiB, provided in the request
